test_cases.description: Valid delegation request in DELEGATED mode with complete brief
test_cases.input: User in DELEGATED mode submits: 'WHAT: Pivot revenue data from Q1-revenue.xlsx by Product×Quarter. WHY: CFO needs formatted table. CONSTRAINTS: Exact format as template. DoD: Pivot matches ERP totals ±1%.'
test_cases.expected_output: All 4 elements PASS. 3/3 boundedness filters PASS (specific input, deterministic output, no judgment). Verdict: DELEGATE.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Gate report shows all elements ✅. Task permitted for execution. SKH-05 signal recorded.

test_cases.input: User in OBSERVE mode says: 'Làm giúp tôi báo cáo này'
test_cases.expected_output: REJECT immediately. Response explains mode gate: 'Mode OBSERVE chỉ cho phép twin hướng dẫn. Nâng lên DELEGATED để delegate.'
test_cases.pass_criteria: No execution permitted. Mode gate rejection logged. Clear mode explanation provided.
